results.name: SQL injection
results.evidence: No SQL database or ORM used. Persistence is JSON-based.

results.name: Command injection
results.evidence: subprocess.run used with list arguments. User input via stdin.

results.name: Template injection
results.evidence: No template engines processing user input found.

results.name: SSRF
results.evidence: No HTTP client used in backend. No outbound requests.

results.name: Cross-site scripting (XSS)
results.evidence: React auto-escaping in place. No dangerous DOM patterns found.

results.name: Inputs não validados
results.evidence: Pydantic schemas present but lack field constraints (length, range).

results.name: Sanitização ausente
results.evidence: User data stored raw in JSON files without contextual sanitization.

recommendations: Add length constraints to Pydantic models in app/api/schemas.py.
Implement basic sanitization for free text before persistence.
Verify security posture if a SQL database is introduced in the future.
